title: rubus evadens
intro: Rubus evadens, also known as the climbing raspberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a species of thorny, climbing vine in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus evadens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive well-being. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
